---
name: "Bug Report"
about: "Report a reproducible bug in StellarForge contracts"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Navigate to '...' (specify the page/section)
2. Click on '....' (specify the button/link/element)
3. Scroll down to '....' (specify the section if applicable)
4. Observe the error behavior

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened instead.

## 🌍 Environment Info
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 13.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **StellarForge Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Rust Version**: [e.g. 1.75.0]
- **Stellar CLI Version**: [e.g. 25.2.0]
- **Network**: [e.g. testnet, mainnet, standalone]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues or pull requests.

## 📋 Possible Solution
If you have any ideas on how to fix this bug, please describe them here.
